# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
#
# `main` is board-agnostic: it pulls in the app logic only. The currently
# selected board provides a `board` component (under boards/<board>/) that
# implements board.h / display.h / touch.h. We REQUIRE it here so the
# board's CMakeLists is parsed and its public headers are on our include
# path.

idf_component_register(
    SRCS
        "main.cpp"
        "usb_hid.cpp"
        "host_api.cpp"
        "fs.cpp"
        "trackpad_widget.cpp"
        # Generated by `just build-proto-c` from ../../proto/touchy.proto.
        # The file lives outside the component so the same source is shared
        # with the host Python library; CMake is happy with the relative
        # path.
        "../../proto/touchy.pb.c"
    INCLUDE_DIRS
        "."
        "../../proto"
    REQUIRES
        board
        esp_lcd
        esp_timer
        esp_app_format
        joltwallet__littlefs
)
